export const metadata = {
  title: 'Attachments',
  description:
    'On this page, we’ll dive into the different attachment endpoints you can use to manage attachments programmatically.',
}

# Don Chong – Who Am I?

Hello, interviewer, friend, or future me.

Thank you for taking the time to learn more about me. I’m Don, a former student at HKUST, a former full-stack developer at IBM, and now a chef. But this isn’t a résumé. These are parts of my journey, not the whole of who I am.

As a kid, I was fascinated by the giants of history: Gauss, Descartes, Feynman. Seeing their names across equations, philosophy, and even the arts inspired a dream — to learn everything the world has to offer. Over time, I came to accept that I’m an ordinary person, with average intelligence and average discipline. But maybe I have a bit more curiosity than most. That curiosity has kept me exploring new ideas and digging deeply into whatever I’m working on, whether it’s programming or cooking.

No matter where life leads me, or how AI changes the world, I hope I’ll always be a lifelong learner.
